inputs.label: Feed Intake
inputs.businessContext: Daily feed consumption per animal. Based on NRC (National Research Council) nutrient requirements.

inputs.label: Weight Gain
inputs.businessContext: Average daily weight gain per animal. Standard livestock performance metric.

inputs.label: Feed Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilogram of feed. Market price based on feed type.

inputs.label: Animal Type
inputs.businessContext: Species-specific feed efficiency benchmarks. Based on agricultural extension data.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.feedConversionRatio > 10: High feed conversion ratio indicates inefficiency.
thresholds.feedCostPerGain > 2: Feed cost per gain exceeds typical threshold.

suggestedActions: feedConversionRatio > 10 ? 'Review feed quality and animal health' : ''
feedCostPerGain > 2 ? 'Negotiate feed prices or optimize ration' : ''
